title: justicia campechiana subsp. campechiana
intro: Justicia campechiana subsp. campechiana, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or Justicia, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia campechiana subsp. campechiana include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Justicia campechiana subsp. campechiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
